nutrition.hotel_stop: Banana + bread w/ honey (~200 kcal) + 500ml water
nutrition.heat_note: >20°C: add 500ml plain water per loop alongside Maurten

days.session: Easy run w/ tempo intervals (4x5 min) + strength
Downhill repeats — fast descent reps on steepest dyke, walk up
Long run — max elevation (Trappenmarathon style) + strength
Back-to-back run with dyke repeats (tired-leg vertical)
Back-to-back medium run with dyke repeats
Long trail run (2,000m+ vert, 6–7 hours) — Trappenmarathon-level effort + strength
Back-to-back run with dyke repeats (tired-leg descending focus)
Alps trail day — 3 loops from hotel in Bourg d'Oisans. Most important training day of the plan.

morning.name: 90/90 hip switches
morning.description: sit on floor, both knees at 90 degrees, rotate side to side. 10 reps each side.

morning.name: Half-kneeling hip flexor stretch
morning.description: rear knee down, squeeze glute, lean forward. 45 sec each side. Add lateral lean away from rear leg for deeper TFL stretch.

morning.name: Open book rotations
morning.description: lie on side, knees stacked, rotate top arm open to floor. 8 reps each side.

morning.name: Cat-cow
morning.description: on all fours, 10 slow reps. Move each vertebra.

morning.name: Thread the needle
morning.description: from all fours, reach one arm under and through. 8 each side.

morning.name: Wall calf stretch
morning.description: 45 sec each side, straight leg then bent knee.
morning.reps: 45 sec each side, straight leg then bent knee

morning.name: Tibialis raises
morning.description: stand on edge of step, raise toes toward shin. 15 reps.

morning.name: World's greatest stretch
morning.description: lunge, plant hand, rotate open, reach overhead. 5 each side.

postrun.name: Couch stretch (rear foot on bench/wall)
postrun.description: 60 sec each side. Best hip flexor opener.

postrun.name: Deep squat hold
postrun.description: 60 sec. Ankles, hips, thoracic spine all at once.

strength.name: Copenhagen adductor plank
strength.purpose: Inner thigh resilience for uneven terrain

strength.name: Single-leg squat to bench
strength.purpose: Quad endurance + balance for technical descent

scenarios.label: Target
scenarios.conditions: Solid prep, pacing discipline, no major issues

key_factors: Descending speed — 5,000m of descent is where time is won or lost
Vertical endurance — sustaining 280+ m/hr climbing rate beyond hour 10
Back-to-back fatigue resistance — running vertical on pre-fatigued legs
Race execution — eat from km 1, hold HR 140–145, power-hike efficiently
